title: Rain Shower Head, Voolan 10" Round High Pressure Shower Heads, 304 Stainless Steel Luxury Modern Chrome Look, Universal Wall and Ceiling Mount
features: RAIN SHOWER HEAD -- Our luxury bathroom rainhead is the perfect replacement that will jet out high pressure rain of hot water so your whole body is doused with the downpour.
WATERFALL SHOWERHEAD -- Made from polished stainless mirror finish, Superior rain spray even at low water flow and pressure.
SELF CLEANSING NOZZLES -- Our large shower head comes with 126 Powered Anti-Clogging Silicone Jets remove hard water deposits such as limescale. A low maintenance shower head for years to come.
EASY TO INSTALL -- G1/2” threads connect to any standard shower arm.(come with a mini wrench is also attached in case you don't have the strength to tighten)
PACKAGE INCLUDES -- 10" Round shower head, Mini wrench, Extra filters, Flow Restrictor, User manual.
